rules.description: Change caps_lock to control if pressed with other keys, to escape if pressed alone.
Exchange numbers and symbols (1234567890 and !@#$%^&*())
Change brackets to command+bracket
Swap backslash and pipe
Change left shift to open paren
Change right shift to close paren
Change caps_lock to control if pressed with other keys, to escape if pressed alone.
Exchange numbers and symbols (1234567890 and !@#$%^&*())
(disabled) Page down/up to click/right click
Right control + square brackets to ctrl-tab and ctrl-shift-tab
Change brackets to command+bracket
Swap backslash and pipe
Change left shift to open paren
Change right shift to close paren
Change caps_lock to control if pressed with other keys, to escape if pressed alone.
left to backspace, right to delete
Right command to hyper key
Left command to open curly/square bracket when pressed alone
Right control to curly/square brackets when pressed alone
arrows
Backspace to super, delete to hyper, backspace to super+7 (an unlike combo) to be reprogrammed later
Exchange numbers and symbols (1234567890 and !@#$%^&*())
Left home to enter
